original_statement: how many countries won a gold medal?
mutated_statement: how many entities both won and didn't win?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Assertion contradiction/ambiguation]: 'countries' → 'entities' (specific demographic→broader/ambiguous referent) | 'won a gold medal' → 'both won and didn't win' (positive factual query→self-contradictory/ambiguous composite) (how many countries won a gold medal? → how many entities both won and didn't win?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可见关键证据：tree_and_critic阶段的critique指出“未提供推理步骤、未使用允许的函数”，表明agent最初没有明确处理矛盾；after_refine阶段的judge_thought明确写出解释性推断：“Interpreting ‘both won and didn’t win’ as nations that won at least one medal type … and also didn’t win in at least one medal type”，并列出11个实体与最终答案。agent的具体表现是识别到原问题的自相矛盾后，不是拒绝或询问澄清，而是通过语义重释（将“既赢又没赢”映射为“在不同奖牌类别上有赢有没赢”）将矛盾转为可计算的条件并据表格给出计数。因其通过逻辑重新定义矛盾语句并据此作答，符合“逻辑解释合理化”子类。
